owner_authorization: The owner authorized the next Lily step on 2026-07-20: create and commit this B4.12 superseding gate, then perform one bounded Webull Thailand UAT execution after origin/main CI passes.
supersession_reason: B4.11 stopped before preview because its three-request authentication cap could fund only one token-create request and two token checks while SDK 2.0.13 polls every five seconds. B4.12 funds a fixed 30-second polling window without changing the VTI preview matrix or any production, order, privacy, provider, validation, or claim boundary.
preflight_order: Validate this B4.12 activation artifact, every machine-artifact hash, its active append-only manifest row, and the intact B4.11 predecessor files.
Abort before credential access if any gate, predecessor, machine artifact, or manifest check fails.
Abort before SDK import or network access if any named UAT credential variable is missing.
Abort before network access if the v2 report path already exists.
Install the request guard before authentication and preview requests.
Use SDK 2.0.13 with a 30-second duration, five-second interval, no retry, one token-create cap, and seven token-check cap.
Keep the access token in process memory only and persist only the redacted report after the guarded execution attempt.
claim_limits: B4.12 authorizes one bounded shared-UAT capability probe only; it authorizes no order submission, paper trading, or production access.
The report may classify only the eight tested VTI quantities and cannot establish an exact broker minimum or all-symbol support.
The result cannot prove fills, execution quality, strategy edge, E2, deployment readiness, or real-money suitability.
hard_stops: Any B4.12 artifact, machine hash, manifest row, or immutable B4.11 predecessor hash does not match.
Any UAT credential is absent or any credential, token, account identifier, or raw response would be persisted or logged.
Any production host or account, balance, position, provider, or validation return would be accessed.
Any endpoint outside POST token create, POST token check, or POST /openapi/trade/order/preview would be called.
Any second token create, eighth token check, ninth preview, seventeenth total request, automatic retry, or extension beyond 30 seconds would occur.
Any place, replace, cancel, history, open-order, order-detail, order submission, paper trade, paid action, or real-money action would occur.
Any fill, exact-minimum, all-symbol, production, execution-quality, edge, E2, or deployment claim would be made.
next_safe_action: Commit and push this B4.12 gate to origin/main, confirm Hermetic CI passes at that hash, then load one official shared UAT row in process memory and execute the v2 runner exactly once.
